mechanics.excerpt: BURPRISE Circumstances may arise which the target completely unaware 0f the attack coming at him; The gamemaster must determine surprise conditions exist; as general rule, they require the right kind of battlefield (cover and/or low light to hide in) and successful Opposed Action Check, using the attacking character" Stealth Skill against tne target" $ Perception Skill: the attacker scores higher MoS than the target, the target surprised.
